slides.title: Financial Entrepreneurship Canvas
slides.body:
Your canvas is your operating model — not a one-page plan.

Engines: financial, client, talent, leadership, marketing, operations.

Day 4 goal: 30%+ completion = FE Canvas v1.

slides.title: Strategy Statement & Priorities
slides.body:
Draft your strategy statement: who you serve + how you win.
Set priority 1–3 for Week 2 execution.
discussionQuestions: What is priority #1 on your canvas?

slides.title: Canvas Peer Review
slides.body:
Dyads review each other's canvas for clarity and gaps.
Mentors coach — do not grade.
discussionQuestions: What gap did your partner identify?

slides.title: Day 4 Deliverables
slides.body:
✓ Canvas v1 (30%+)
✓ Career direction checkpoint
✓ Portfolio canvas section updated
discussionQuestions: What will you present on Day 5?
